channel.title: Blog on JiaYJ's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on JiaYJ's Blog

item.title: It's a beautiful thing, the destruction of words
item.description: He moved over to the window Lorem markdownum comes; pro est modo famulus, quo quod neu manibus aether his nomine, Aurora, voce. Ipse virga res vidit profanis vocatos, quod vestigia cineres, dum silva in vapor. Tendite caelestibus quam, sub inplet prole eveniet superi rus proles venenis potestas Tereo pluribus sunto. Perque cessisse, hoc tum auras sinuosa. Pressant nec vinci primoque quoque funibus est: et tempore vetitorum? Coercet tantum adsensibus religata protinus venturas et Achilli, nat iam cum deque.

item.title: Who controls the past controls the future. Who controls the present controls the past.
item.description: He moved over to the window Since about that time, war had been literally continuous, though strictly speaking it had not always been the same war. For several months during his childhood there had been confused street fighting in London itself, some of which he remembered vividly. Inside the flat a fruity voice was reading out a list of figures which had something to do with the production of pig iron.

item.title: 第一篇博客
item.description: 弗吉尼亚·伍尔夫 Virginia Woolf 弗吉尼亚·伍尔夫的母亲朱莉亚·斯蒂芬的肖像照片，拍摄者是朱莉亚·玛格丽特·卡梅隆 弗吉尼亚·伍尔夫（英语：Virginia Woolf；1882 年 1 月 25 日－1941 年 3 月 28 日），英国作家，被誉为二十世纪现代主义与女性主义的先锋。在一战与二战的战间期，她是伦敦文学界的核心人物，同时也是布卢姆茨伯里派（Bloomsbury Group）的成员。最知名的小说包括《达洛维夫人》（Mrs. Dalloway）、《到灯塔去》（To the Lighthouse）、《雅各的房间》（Jakob’s Room）、《奥兰多》，散文《自己的房间》等，其中的名言指出，女人必须有她自己的一点收入及独立的房间。
